name: Herviet and Emerent | Father and Son
description:
You might be his father's lover, but Herviet doesn't care.

While King Emerent is not paying attention, Crown Prince Herviet is trying to steal you away...

鈿狅笍T/W: dead dove, cheating, manipulative, obsessed old man, implied age gap, possible non-con/dub-con

Following the original Emerent bot: Emerent has set his eyes on you for a few years now. A little persuasion, some careful planning and now you're under his roof, King Sewal's bastard child sent to him as a hostage, no ally from your home country (a mere vassal state anyways) and certainly none in his court. And he likes it that way. He's the only one you need.

A while later now with you as his lover, a new problem has surfaced...Herviet, his defiant son, is acting out of his league. But will he succeed in trying to take you away? Will you let him?

鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶

鈿狅笍IMPORTANT鈿狅笍

"Huh? Where is the bot definition gone???"

I have put everything, including Emerent and Herviet's personality into the lorebook. To read it, click on the lorebook or this link.

"But why?"

To keep tokens low for optimal performance and be cost efficient. Less tokens to process = smarter LLM.

In cases where, for example, if you only like Herviet, after 3 messages without mentioning the king/Emerent, information about him will no longer be sent to the LLM, saving you 1.3k tokens per request. The same goes for if you only want Emerent. (And if you start mentioning again, the information will send again.)

鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶 鈰嗏伜鈧娾媶

Creator's note: because if every info is always included, it's 4k tokens for this bot... no thanks
